## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + format + tests)
- [ ] New domain logic has colocated Vitest tests
- [ ] Invariants in [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) are respected (revision bump, derived reservations, conflict rules, approver derivation)
- [ ] Domain terms from PRODUCT_PLAN.md §4 used correctly (Move, Reservation, Conflict, Connector)
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes
